mapper.insert: INSERT INTO LQ_USER_QUEST_PROGRESS ( USER_QUEST_PROGRESS_ID, USER_QUEST_ID, QUEST_LOCATION_ID, IS_COMPLETED, COMPLETED_AT ) VALUES ( SEQ_LQ_USER_QUEST_PROGRESS_PK.NEXTVAL, #{userQuestId}, #{questLocationId}, #{isCompleted}, #{completedAt} )

INSERT INTO LQ_USER_QUEST_PROGRESS ( USER_QUEST_PROGRESS_ID, USER_QUEST_ID, QUEST_LOCATION_ID, IS_COMPLETED, COMPLETED_AT ) SELECT SEQ_LQ_USER_QUEST_PROGRESS_PK.NEXTVAL, #{userQuestId}, ql.QUEST_LOCATION_ID, 0, NULL FROM LQ_QUEST_LOCATION ql WHERE ql.QUEST_ID = #{questId}
mapper.update: MERGE INTO LQ_USER_QUEST_PROGRESS target USING ( SELECT #{userQuestId} AS USER_QUEST_ID, #{questLocationId} AS QUEST_LOCATION_ID, #{completedAt} AS COMPLETED_AT FROM DUAL ) source ON ( target.USER_QUEST_ID = source.USER_QUEST_ID AND target.QUEST_LOCATION_ID = source.QUEST_LOCATION_ID ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET target.IS_COMPLETED = 1, target.COMPLETED_AT = source.COMPLETED_AT WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( USER_QUEST_PROGRESS_ID, USER_QUEST_ID, QUEST_LOCATION_ID, IS_COMPLETED, COMPLETED_AT ) VALUES ( SEQ_LQ_USER_QUEST_PROGRESS_PK.NEXTVAL, source.USER_QUEST_ID, source.QUEST_LOCATION_ID, 1, source.COMPLETED_AT )
mapper.select: SELECT uqp.USER_QUEST_PROGRESS_ID as userQuestProgressId, uqp.USER_QUEST_ID as userQuestId, uq.QUEST_ID as questId, q.TITLE as questTitle, uq.STATUS as userQuestStatus, uq.STARTED_AT as startedAt, uq.COMPLETED_AT as completedAt, q.TIME_LIMIT as timeLimit, ql.QUEST_LOCATION_ID as questLocationId, ql.LOCATION_ID as locationId, ql.VISIT_ORDER as visitOrder, l.NAME as locationName, uqp.IS_COMPLETED as isCompleted, uqp.COMPLETED_AT as progressCompletedAt, progress_count.TOTAL_COUNT as totalCount, progress_count.COMPLETED_COUNT as completedCount FROM LQ_USER_QUEST_PROGRESS uqp INNER JOIN LQ_USER_QUEST uq ON uq.USER_QUEST_ID = uqp.USER_QUEST_ID INNER JOIN LQ_QUEST_LOCATION ql ON ql.QUEST_LOCATION_ID = uqp.QUEST_LOCATION_ID INNER JOIN LQ_QUEST q ON q.QUEST_ID = uq.QUEST_ID LEFT JOIN LQ_LOCATION l ON l.LOCATION_ID = ql.LOCATION_ID INNER JOIN ( SELECT USER_QUEST_ID, COUNT(*) as TOTAL_COUNT, SUM(CASE WHEN NVL(IS_COMPLETED, 0) = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as COMPLETED_COUNT FROM LQ_USER_QUEST_PROGRESS GROUP BY USER_QUEST_ID ) progress_count ON progress_count.USER_QUEST_ID = uqp.USER_QUEST_ID WHERE uq.USER_ID = #{userId} AND ql.LOCATION_ID = #{locationId} AND uq.STATUS = 'IN_PROGRESS' AND NVL(q.STATUS, 'ACTIVE') != 'DELETED' ORDER BY uq.USER_QUEST_ID DESC, ql.VISIT_ORDER ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LQ_USER_QUEST_PROGRESS WHERE USER_QUEST_ID = #{_parameter} AND NVL(IS_COMPLETED, 0) = 0
